title: Remote download progress jumps to ~80% then crawls
description: Remote (RunPod) model install bar pops to ~80% instantly then crawls; fix denominator + hold indeterminate until real totals known.
activeSessionTitle: Owned by MPI-97 session. Fixed: (1) 'sits at 100%' aggregation via _depDenominator seed floor; (2) post-uninstall 36/36+partial contradiction = keep-uninstall deleting per-model custom_node + byte-only bar. App-side, no image. Pending USER live-verify after app restart.

attention.reason: Fixes applied; needs USER live-verify on a CPU Pod after app RESTART (route code does not hot-reload).
